mapper.select: select cm1.category_id, cm1.category_name, cm1.child_category_id, CASE WHEN cm2.category_name IS NULL THEN '' ELSE cm2.category_name END AS child_category_name from category_master cm1 LEFT JOIN category_master cm2 ON cm1.category_id = cm2.child_category_id
select cm1.category_id, cm1.category_name from category_master cm1 WHERE cm1.category_id = #{category_id}
